title: THE REBASE REDEMPTION
description: History has been rewritten. Use advanced techniques to uncover the original timeline.
story_intro:
They said the case was closed. They said the history was clean. But I knew better.

Someone had rewritten the timeline - a rebase so clean it almost erased the truth. Almost.

'Detective, this goes deep,' my partner warned. 'Rebasing history is dangerous territory.'

I smiled grimly. Danger is my middle name. Time to redeem the past.

steps.instruction: View the complete history including all refs.
steps.narrative: The official history was sanitized, but ghosts remain. I needed to see everything.
steps.hint: Show reference logs or all commits

steps.instruction: Start an interactive rebase of the last 3 commits.
steps.narrative: Time to dive into the timeline and examine each commit closely.
steps.hint: Start interactive rebase for last 3 commits

steps.instruction: Stash your current changes before the operation.
steps.narrative: Before going deeper, I needed to secure my current findings.
Operation complete. Time to restore my secured evidence.

steps.instruction: Reset the last commit but keep the changes staged.
steps.narrative: The final piece. Undo the cover-up while preserving the evidence.
steps.hint: Reset to previous commit, keep changes staged
